title: Cobblemon Added Recipies
description: This data pack adds several recipes for the crafting of unobtainable items in cobblemon.
body:
## Cobblemon Added recipies

Cobblemon Added Recipes or C.A.R contains a number of recipes aiming to make some currently unobtainable items obtainable. this project will be kept up to date for Minecraft and Cobblemon hopefully.

The data pack contains:
- XS candy
- S candy
- M candy
- L candy
- XL candy
- Rare candy
- All types of apricorn seeds

These can all be crafted from lapis lazuli and with these recipes you wont need to grind as much and can focus on playing with friends or finding Pokémon.
